/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/hyprlandmonitorplugin.dir/link.d  -o /home/yujon/.local/lib/qt6/qml/HyprlandMonitor/libhyprlandmonitorplugin.so CMakeFiles/hyprlandmonitorplugin.dir/hyprlandmonitorplugin_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hyprlandmonitorplugin.dir/hyprlandmonitorplugin_HyprlandMonitorPlugin.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/yujon/Projects/quickshell/modules/HyprlandMonitor libhyprlandmonitor.so /usr/lib/libQt6Qml.so.6.10.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.10.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.10.0
